case_title: PORFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC VS. MAUREEN F PEINE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PORFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES, LLC

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JAN-29-2013 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
